overall.description: Nighttime first-person walk along a wet city sidewalk in a video game environment (GTA V style). The camera moves steadily forward past parked cars and hedges toward a lit billboard and intersection, with artificial street lighting illuminating the reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with street parking and hedge boundary

events.description: vehicle with headlights passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk at night, passing parked vehicles on the left

notable_agents.action: sedan driving past on the street, headlights illuminating the wet road

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles along the curb with illuminated brake lights
tall green hedge running along the sidewalk boundary
low brick wall at the base of the hedge row
large illuminated advertising billboard visible above the street ahead
tall street lamps casting light on the road and sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark urban sidewalk at night, bordered by a hedge row on the right and parked cars on the left. The camera moves forward steadily as a vehicle passes by on the street, its headlights cutting through the darkness. A brightly lit billboard is visible in the distance above the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching urban intersection with traffic signals

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward the intersection, moving past the line of parked cars

entered.detail: red traffic signals visible at the upcoming intersection

segments.scene_description: Moving past the parked cars, the scene continues along the hedge-lined sidewalk toward an intersection. The billboard grows larger in the frame as the camera approaches, and red traffic lights become visible in the distance. The hedge remains a constant presence on the right side while the parked vehicles fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection approach with visible crosswalk

events.description: ground surface transitions from concrete sidewalk to asphalt crosswalk area

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk at the intersection, preparing to cross the multi-lane street

entered.detail: white painted lines marking the pedestrian crossing area on the asphalt
wide asphalt road surface of the intersection with reflective wet patches

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the intersection where the sidewalk meets the crosswalk. The hedge row falls away as the camera moves into a more open space, revealing the white stripes of the pedestrian crossing and the wide asphalt road. The illuminated billboard is now prominently visible overhead, and the traffic signals are clearly seen ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark urban sidewalk that gradually opens into a brightly lit city intersection. It begins beside a hedge row and a line of parked cars, moving steadily forward as the headlights of a passing vehicle cut through the nighttime gloom. As the camera advances, the parked cars fall behind and the distant, glowing billboard grows larger in the frame while red traffic lights emerge ahead. The scene then shifts as the hedge row falls away, expanding the view into an open pedestrian area. Finally, the camera reaches the edge of the wide asphalt road, revealing the white stripes of the crosswalk beneath the prominent glow of the overhead billboard.
